positive: Minimalist celestial creature, stylized as a sleek, winged griffin merging with cosmic nebulae. The griffin should have anatomical elements suggesting mythology but rendered with clean, flowing lines and bold, black-line silhouettes. The background should incorporate swirling cosmic dust and vibrant, bioluminescent nebula colors (electric blue, deep purple, cyan, magenta) radiating from behind the creature. Center composition, high contrast, vector-art style, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Highly detailed, art deco influence, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting. No gradients or photorealism. Concept art, emblem style.
negative: blur, photorealistic, gradient, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, grainy, cartoon, anime, painting, abstract background only
